    U

    UNKNOWN - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.lexing.TokenType
    Unrecognised token.
    UnknownInstructionException - Exception Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error
    Thrown when an instruction cannot be identified or is not registered in the current instruction set.
